description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a mix of flat and gable roofs, clad in horizontal wood siding and brickwork. The structure includes multiple volumes, with a prominent central section and several wings extending outward, creating a dynamic footprint. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and visual interest. The front entryway is defined by a covered porch with supporting columns, flanked by landscaped hedges and a paved walkway. A detached tree and various shrubs enhance the curb appeal, while a balcony and patio areas provide outdoor living spaces. The overall appearance is contemporary yet warm, blending natural materials with clean lines.
description: A modern, multi-volume house with flat and gable roofs, wood and brick exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, hedges, and a large tree in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat-roofed central section, balcony, and extended wings with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brick chimney, dual gable roofs, and a paved patio area with surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the carport, additional windows, and a detached tree, with visible garden beds.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single main door, steps, and landscaped approach
